mapper.select: select f004n,f001d,company_code from t_company0011 order by f001d desc
select concat(f001n,'-',f002n) ym , f004n,f005n,f006n,f007n from t_stock0005 t where company_code = #{companycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by t.f001n desc ,t.f002n desc limit 0,3
select company_code,f002n as price from v_trade0001 where time = #{time,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
